subcodes.first_line: The Book hath testified that there is none other God but Him, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, and the verses have borne witness that there is none other God but He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد الکتاب انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم و شهدت الایات انه لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
